parameters.description: Relay messages to your own Fluxer through the UnitySVC gateway. POST a native fluxer payload; the gateway composes the upstream URL from your stored secrets and forwards it. The free byok channel uses your own stored credentials; the plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
parameters.plus_base_url: ${ customer_secrets.FLUXER_BASE ?? https://api.fluxer.app }/webhooks/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_token_secret }} }

webhook_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's fluxer webhook id

webhook_token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's fluxer webhook token
